name: crm-schema-audit
description: Audit your HubSpot CRM schema: find duplicate properties, visualize your data model as ERDs, and get a cleanup roadmap.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Run a full CRM schema audit and generate an HTML report

env.name: HUBSPOT_ACCESS_TOKEN
env.description: HubSpot Private App token with crm.schemas.read scope

env.name: HUBSPOT_PORTAL_ID
env.description: HubSpot portal ID for Data Model Viewer links
